name: GREENLIGHT CAPITAL RE, LTD.
summary: Greenlight Capital Re, Ltd. is a global specialty property and casualty reinsurer established in 2004 and headquartered in the Cayman Islands, listed on NASDAQ (GLRE). It operates through Greenlight Re (Grand Cayman), GRIL (Dublin, Ireland), and Syndicate 3456 at Lloyd's. The company offers multi-line P&C reinsurance globally, specialty reinsurance, and an Innovations business unit supporting technology-driven insurance partners with seed capital and reinsurance capacity, complemented by a non-traditional investment strategy through Solasglas Investments, LP.
